column2: Exchange Rate on Forex Market - monthly values
The average monthly exchange rate is calculated as a simple arithmetic mean of daily exchange rates on the forex market communicated by the NBR
available series from January 2005; for Jan.-June 2005 the values are extrapolated based on cotations in ROL (the  currency circulating before the denomination)
